analysis.consistency: The spell description is internally consistent, detailing eight distinct outcomes based on a d8 roll, which is standard for Prismatic Spray.
analysis.quality: The description is high quality, clearly outlining the mechanics, damage types, saving throws, and the complex multi-turn conditions for the Indigo and Violet rays. The formatting (using bold and numbered lists) aids readability.

unique_mechanics.name: Indigo (Restrain/Petrify)
unique_mechanics.details: Imposes Restrained condition on failed save. Subjected to ongoing Constitution saves (3 successes end effect, 3 failures result in permanent petrification/petrified condition). Successes/failures track independently.

unique_mechanics.name: Violet (Blind/Planar Travel)
unique_mechanics.details: Imposes Blinded condition on failed save. Subjected to a Wisdom save at start of caster's next turn. Success ends Blindness. Failure transports the target to another plane determined by the GM.

unique_mechanics.name: Special (Two Rays)
unique_mechanics.details: Target is struck by two rays (reroll any subsequent 8s).

potential_issues_or_clarifications: The Indigo effect (petrification countdown) is complex but standard for this spell version. Tracking three successes vs. three failures simultaneously requires careful GM bookkeeping.
